commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the iMessage send runtime so media-only sends to explicit chat targets prefer `imsg send-attachment --transport auto`, with fallback to the existing RPC send path and regression tests for chat GUID, chat ID, unavailable advanced commands, failed JSON, and DM media behavior.

PR surface: Source +229, Tests +126. Total +355 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue and PR proof give a concrete iMessage group-media reproduction path, and current `main` source shows media still goes through RPC `send`; I did not rerun a live Mac/iMessage proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is queued because the prior fallback finding is addressed; the remaining action is maintainer review/CI/live-proof judgment under the protected `maintainer` label.

target.title: fix(imessage): send group media via attachment command
target.body:
## Summary

Recreates #86720 after #86734 reverted it so the #83365 iMessage group media fix can go through a clean review cycle.

Fixes iMessage media-only sends to explicit chat targets by routing them through `imsg send-attachment --transport auto` instead of the generic RPC `send` payload with a file path.

## Why

While testing #83365 on Lobster, normal iMessage group image replies generated the PNG but did not deliver a media attachment. Direct `imsg send-rich --file` also failed on the same group with an IMCore attachment staging error, while `imsg send-attachment --transport auto` succeeded and produced a real attachment row.

DM media sends by handle already worked, so this keeps handle/DM sends on the existing path and only changes explicit chat media-only sends (`chat_id` / `chat_guid`).

## Changes

- Add a CLI JSON helper for the iMessage send runtime.
- For media-only explicit chat sends, resolve `chat_id` to a chat GUID when needed and call `send-attachment --transport auto`.
- Preserve existing RPC send behavior for DM handle media sends and text/caption sends.
- Add unit coverage for chat GUID, chat ID, and DM handle media behavior.

## Prior work / credit

This intentionally recreates the previously merged #86720 after its procedural revert in #86734. Original fix and Lobster proof by @omarshahine.

## Real behavior proof

Lobster Mac proof from #86720 / #83365:

- Generated media-only iMessage group reply produced the PNG but did not land through the normal send path.
- Direct `imsg send-rich --file` failed for the same group with an IMCore staging error.
- `imsg send-attachment --transport auto` succeeded and produced a visible attachment row in the group chat.

## Verification

- `git diff --cached --check`
- `pnpm format:check -- extensions/imessage/src/send.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`
- `pnpm test extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/actions.runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`

Fixes #83365
target.author: omarshahine

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
